reviews.review_description: Horrible game, just free models with nothing to do

Its kinda fun i think there is to many gliches and bugs wich makes it not fun and i think the is like nothing to do so i would reconnect making it better 
so overall its bad
I'm stuck in a black void.

I found a secret maps and there is zombies everywhere. I’m on the tower one and I have no clue where the 
The second one is I can’t find it. There’s a lot of zombies and it’s pretty fun game but really stressful so I give it a five out of five it’s really fun ￼￼￼

reviews.review_title: I keep falling out of the map
reviews.review_description: When I try to move I fall through the ground

I see you put tons of effort in the game it’s great even if it looks so basic the mechanics and work put into this is great there are a bunch of bugs but it’s really good and I hope it is getting more updates

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. Encouragements with such constructive criticism will help us improve the game experience. Thank you again.
Thank you for the review. Please email us with details of the problem at uralstech@gmail.com.

reviews.review_title: I can’t get past first level
reviews.review_description: There are no levels please fix I’m crying right now because of it I just wanted a free sandbox physics game

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for reviewing our game! We've uploaded a tutorial video for VR Playground on our YouTube channel - https://youtu.be/SbUc2JdLYVY. The new update with a better tutorial is out - 1.12.1! Check it out!

If you still face problems, please email us with screenshots at uralstech@gmail.com.

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I cant unlock gorilla mode, i have stick drift and there are no levels. Edit: So if you dont know what stick drift is it moves you anywhere but my stick drift is unfixable because it pulls me all the way to the void.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry you are having problems with the game. We have disabled the cloud backup in the game. Please reinstall the game to see the Hand Locomotion (gorilla mode) selection screen. To backup your data please register and sign in.

If you still face problems, please email us with screenshots at uralstech@gmail.com.

Thank you.
